== Notes for [[Item:Q100781|Q100781]] ==

A descendant of King David as well as of Constantine the Great, Cleopatra, Pythagoras, Ahmose I Pharaoh of Egypt (1549–1524 BC), Hiram of Tyre, King of Persia Darius the Great, Various Greek and Roman Emperors

https://www.geni.com/family-tree/index/6000000017177537870 (Select Direct Ancestors Only on "Preferences" at the bottom of the tree for simplicity as well as choose all Ancestors on Ancestors to display)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8D86781EFBBFA9822EF79916CE1BA
geni:6000000076378699859

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
